modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Alternate host can't join the scheduled Zoom meeting.

full_description_text:  
I set up an alternate host for my Zoom meeting, but they can't get in. It's super frustrating because I thought it would work smoothly. Can you help figure out why they’re locked out?
short_description: Alternate host can't join the scheduled Zoom meeting.
description: I set up an alternate host for my Zoom meeting, but they can't get in. It's super frustrating because I thought it would work smoothly. Can you help figure out why they’re locked out?
